title: Computing the Gradient of a Matrix Function
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for calculating the gradient of a scalar function with respect to a matrix variable, showing the relationship between the matrix, its elements, and the resulting gradient matrix.
relationships: f(X) is differentiated with respect to each element X_ij of matrix X
Each partial derivative ∂f/∂X_ij is computed and placed into the corresponding (i,j) position
The collection of all partial derivatives forms the gradient matrix ∇f(X)
